title: 2025-11-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 21.43
description: New daily signal for 2025-11-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.43/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-11-17, the score printed 21.43/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
